Study Material

SSC Syllabus 📋

Complete and updated syllabus for all SSC examinations

SSC CGL Syllabus FREE

Tier I: General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Awareness, Quantitative Aptitude, English Comprehension.
Tier II: Mathematical Abilities, Reasoning, English Language, General Knowledge, Computer Knowledge, Data Entry Speed Test.

SSC CHSL Syllabus FREE

Tier I: English Language, General Intelligence, Quantitative Aptitude, General Awareness.
Tier II: Mathematical Abilities, Reasoning, English Language, General Awareness, Computer Knowledge.

SSC GD Constable Syllabus FREE

General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Knowledge & Awareness, Elementary Mathematics, English / Hindi. Plus Physical Efficiency Test (PET) and Medical Examination.

SSC MTS Syllabus FREE

Paper I: Numerical & Mathematical Ability, Reasoning Ability & Problem Solving, General Awareness, English Language & Comprehension.
Paper II: Short Essay / Letter in English or Hindi.

SSC JE Syllabus FREE

Paper I: General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Awareness, General Engineering (Civil/Electrical/Mechanical).
Paper II: Conventional — General Engineering (Subject Specific).

SSC CPO Syllabus FREE

Paper I & II: General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Knowledge, Quantitative Aptitude, English Comprehension. Plus PET/PST Physical Tests.
